transcript.text:
[City of Jecheon's red fishcake]
What's the most number of skewers eaten?
[What will be Tzuyang's record?]
Your stomach will explode
It'll be fine
Hello everyone
I'm here at Jecheon today
I'm going to be in a show program called "Hometown Report" tomorrow, so I got here earlier
I came to Jecheon's famous red fishcake place Let's go
Fishcake shop
Hello
Red fishcake 1 serving for 2,000 Won (~$1.78 USD)
3 skewers for 1,000 Won!? (~$0.89 USD)
So 1 person usually eats 6 skewers?
Do you think I can buy the whole pot of these red fishcakes?
Yes you can Really?

Then I'll take the whole thing
Are you Tzuyang?
3.5 million
[It's May now] [Give me an autograph]
2 of them
[They moved it into a new pot for her]
They really gave me the whole thing
We'll count as we go Bon appetit
Red fishcakes Looks delicious
[On a phone call] Do you know the YouTuber Tzuyang?
Daddy got an autograph
I don't think this has been sitting here for a long time
But the sauce is soaked in
Tasty
Perfect bite-size
Wait a sec,

I forgot to count
That was 5
Went by quick
The fishcake feels very thin
It's 2 layers
[Counting]
Rice cake would've been nice here
I saw it earlier
Reset
It's pretty late right now
I didn't see that many people outside
But customers are keep coming in
To describe its taste,
It's like dipping fishcake skewers into a spicy rice cake sauce
The sauce is very similar to a spicy rice cake sauce Just missing the rice cake
It's spicier than I thought

I was going to count as I eat
Soak it in the sauce
She's almost done with it
Is the slushie available right now?
Can I have the grape flavor, please?
[Slushies]
Thank you That was quick
It's been so long
This straw is a must
Such a good combination
Perfect for each other
Thank you
Fishcake soup to pour in
Let me get a sip first
I want to drink it all
[Save it for the dish]

Just a little bit
It's warm now probably
It is
[Hot, Cold, Hot, Cold]
[This is it]
That went by pretty quickly
Like 20 minutes?
I could've done a mukbang challenge
Too many people will beat the challenge then
Excuse me
2 red rice cakes and 3 fishcake soup, please
Oh no!
[Grab it or no]
Thank you
What's the most number of skewers eaten?
They got drunk and made a bet that he can eat 150

He couldn't do it so he ended up paying for it all
Is that so?
Rice cake!
Looks good
Looks like what you will use for spicy rice cake
Delicious
It's very chewy
The soup is amazing
It's hot
I wonder who ate 115 skewers though
It's spicier than I thought
Spicy
50 cleared
3 of these for 1,000 Won Isn't that really cheap?
Can I have 10 more, please?
I'll just take these

Thank you
[50 red fishcakes, 13 fishcakes in soup, 2 rice cake]
[Stay!]
[Time to eat]
[Finished]
Amazing
So good at eating
Excuse me, 11 more, please
Which ones? Half & half
[56 red fishcakes, 18 fishcakes in soup, 2 rice cake]
Wouldn't your stomach explode?
I'll be okay
You should stop eating
[Saying she's eating too much]
I'll stop after this
Excuse me,

Can I have an orange slushie?
This one's on the house
Thank you
Very nice
This is it
[Another brain freeze]
My head was about to explode
You ate it too fast
[Neutralize]
It's warm now
I'm happy
This is all ice
It's like that when you suck out all the juice
I remember this
I'm cold, but I can't give it up
So good at eating

The customers were saying you can eat a lot of food
"There is a small lady that can eat so much food"
Really?
[Let's count]
76!
Ranked #1 for a sober person That other person was drunk, that's why it was possible
It's #2 overall
Yay, I'm ranked #2 Good job, congrats!
I got to try the red fishcakes today
I think it's a perfect place to get some drinks because it's cheap
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
